name: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
description: Given an m x n matrix of heights, water can flow from a cell to an adjacent cell (4-directionally) if the adjacent cell's height is <= current. The Pacific ocean touches the top and left edges. The Atlantic ocean touches the bottom and right edges. Return a list of cells where water can flow to both oceans.
constraints: m == heights.length. n == heights[i].length. 1 <= m, n <= 200. 0 <= heights[i][j] <= 10^5.
python_template:
